levels.title: Absolute Beginner
levels.milestone: Read any Croatian word aloud correctly and greet, introduce yourself, and count.
canDo: Use bok / dobar dan / hvala / molim / doviđenja naturally.
Say your name and nationality with 'Ja sam…'; count to 20.

levels.title: Beginner
levels.milestone: Handle simple daily exchanges using the present tense and the nominative + accusative cases.
canDo: Conjugate biti and regular present-tense verbs.
Use the nominative (subject) and accusative (object) correctly.
Form questions (li, question words) and negatives.
Talk about the past (perfekt) and future (futur) in simple sentences.

levels.title: Elementary
levels.milestone: Describe routines, past events and plans, and start using the genitive, dative and locative cases.
canDo: Use the genitive (of/possession/after numbers) and locative (location) cases.
Handle aspect pairs to distinguish ongoing vs completed actions.
Manage travel, shopping and everyday transactions.

levels.title: Intermediate
levels.milestone: Hold real conversations, give opinions, and use all seven cases with growing accuracy.
canDo: Use the full case system, including instrumental and vocative.
Follow the main points of clear standard speech and simple media.

levels.title: Upper Intermediate
levels.milestone: Discuss abstract topics and follow native Croatian media without constant translation.
canDo: Argue a point with nuance and correct case/aspect usage.
Understand news, films and podcasts for native speakers.
Write clear, detailed texts on a range of subjects.

levels.title: Advanced
levels.milestone: Use Croatian flexibly and effectively for social, academic and professional life.
canDo: Express yourself spontaneously and almost effortlessly.
Understand long, demanding texts and implicit meaning.
Use register, dialect and idiom deliberately. (C2 native mastery is out of scope.)
